subject: Re: M crashed when I import the species
body:
I found the reason. Just because of binary mask.
在2021年4月16日星期五 UTC+8 下午5:13:30<yuqi zhang> 写道：

> Does anyone know about this?
>
> 在2021年4月15日星期四 UTC+8 下午5:30:02<yuqi zhang> 写道：
>
>> Hi,
>> the lastcrash.txt had some error imformation:
>>
>> 04/15/2021 17:06:07:
>> System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of 
>> an object.
>>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in 
>> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 301
>>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in 
>> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 290
>>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in 
>> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 301
>>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in 
>> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 290
>>
>> And I reconstruct the tomogram with binning 1. Then I used Warp to bin 8 
>> for the full tomogram reconstruction and bin 4 for subtomogram 
>> reconstruction. And in M, I specified the parameter as figures. You may use 
>> them.
>>
>
